form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1720m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track was 2nd-0.28 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Hesharley (2:04.60) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $34. Gets the ace draw so can may a role in the finish.
